calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Business Interests As Assets Of The Trust
Off Calendar Mar-30-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Rothstein for (co-trustees) Susan & Daniel McLaughlin.

The Court stated that this is a Heggstad petition regarding business interests, that the notice issues have been addressed, that no objections have been filed and that it is inclined to grant the petition except as to the 2 business interests acquired subsequent to the execution of the trust. The Court granted the petition for order confirming business interests as assets of the trust (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Fender. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Confirming Business Interests As Assets Of The Trust
Off Calendar Feb-16-2016 Continued To Mar-22-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Rothstein for (petitioners & co-trustees) Daniel & Susan McLaughlin.

The Court asked if the business interests shouldn't get notice. Mr. Rothstein stated that he is not aware of a requirement to notice them. The Court stated that there may be some sort of provision on the transfer of interest into the trust. Mr. Rothstein stated that it is akin to Mr. McLaughlin transferring assets and that he has not seen anything on an operating schedule. The Court stated that they could have an interest in how their shares are held, that the trusts are not in front of the court, that it is not sure why notice is not appropriate, asked if there was a problem in providing notice, asked about the two interests that post date the assignment. The petition for order confirming business interests as assets of the trust was continued to March 22, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to either provide notice to the companies or a reason as to why not.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
